description_long: This is a vintage-style open-face helmet with a smooth, rounded shell predominantly colored in blue. A single, wide beige stripe runs from the front to the back along the top center of the helmet, adding a classic racing aesthetic. On each side, there is a circular beige emblem featuring a five-pointed star, giving the helmet a retro and sporty appearance. The helmet has a white or light gray trim around the open face and lower edge, which appears to be made of a softer, possibly rubberized material for comfort and impact absorption. There are two small circular holes near the bottom edge on each side, likely for ventilation or attachment purposes. The interior is not visible, but the helmet is likely lined with padding for safety and comfort.
description: A blue open-face helmet with a beige center stripe and star emblems on each side, featuring a white trim and small side holes. The design is retro and sporty, with a smooth, rounded shell.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue shell, beige star emblem, white trim, and a small circular hole near the bottom edge.
description_view_1: Front-top view highlighting the wide beige stripe running along the helmet's center and the symmetrical placement of the star emblems on each side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the star emblem and small hole visible, as well as the white trim.
description_view_3: Direct front view showing the open face, white trim, and the central beige stripe, with the star emblems partially visible on the sides.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two small circular holes on each side near the bottom edge; no other vents visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Blue shell with a single wide beige center stripe and beige star emblems on each side; retro racing style.
